input.command: last reboot && sysctl -n dev.nodes.shutdown_reason && sysctl -n kern.boottime
input.description: Checking reboot history and last shutdown reason code

input.command: log show --predicate 'eventMessage CONTAINS "Previous shutdown cause"' --last 24h && ls -lt /Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports | head -n 20
input.description: Searching for shutdown cause and recent diagnostic reports
Searching logs and sysctl for shutdown cause
input.command: log show --last 24h --predicate 'message contains "Previous shutdown cause"' && sysctl kern.last_shutdown_reason && ls -lt /Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/ | head -n 10

input.description: Extracting shutdown reason using multiple methods
Listing all panic logs and searching for thermal/GPU/watchdog messages in logs

input.command:
log show --start "2026-03-14 14:55:00" --end "2026-03-14 15:03:07" --style syslog > crash_window.log && grep -E "watchdogd|WindowServer|DCP|GPU|thermal|critical" crash_window.log | head -n 200;
ls -lt /Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/ | grep ".panic" | head -n 10
input.description: Extracting logs around the crash time and listing panic reports

input.prompt:
I am investigating a kernel panic on a MacBook Pro (M1 Max, macOS 15.7.4).
Panic String: 'watchdog timeout: no checkins from watchdogd in 92 seconds'.
The panic log mentions 'DCPEXT2Endpoint' and 'WindowServer' having many page faults.
The user asked to find the cause of 'Гдц' (GDC/GCD?).

Please analyze:
1. What does 'Гдц' likely refer to in this context (Grand Central Dispatch, Graphics Display Controller, or something else)?
2. How does a watchdog timeout in 'watchdogd' relate to 'DCPEXT2Endpoint' or 'WindowServer' hangs?
3. Are there known issues with macOS 15.7.4 (Sequoia) involving display controller hangs on M1/M2/M3 Macs?
4. What are the common 'GDC' or 'GCD' related reasons for such a watchdog timeout?

Context:
- MacBookPro18,2
- OS: macOS 15.7.4 (24G517)
- Kernel: 24.6.0
- panic String: watchdog timeout: no checkins from watchdogd in 92 seconds
- Involved: DCPEXT2Endpoint, kernel_task blocked on mutex.
input.description: Consult Oracle about the crash and the term 'Гдц'
